title: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology Act, 2014
full_text: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology Act, 2014 भारतीय सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थाधनअधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201430 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 2014-12-08 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The Indian Institutes of Information Technology Act, 2014 Hindi Title: भारतीय सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थाधनअधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to declare certain institutions of information technology to be institutions of national importance, with a view to develop new knowledge in information technology and to provide manpower of global standards for the information technology industry and to provide for certain other matters connected with such institutions or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 05-01-2015 Notification: 5th January, 2015, vide notification No. S.O. 41(E) , dated 5th January, 2015, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. Effect of incorporation of Institutes. Section 6. Objects of Institute. Section 7. Powers and functions of Institute. Section 8. Institute to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 9. Powers and functions of Senate. Section 18. Finance Committee. Section 19. Power and functions of Finance Committee. Section 20. Building and Works Committee. Section 21. Section 27. Review of performance of Institute. Section 28. Grants by Central Government. Section 29. Fund of Institute. Section 30. Accounts and audit. Section 31. Pension and provident fund. Section 32. Appointments. Section 33. Statutes. Show Related Subordinates Section 34. Statutes how to be made. Section 35. Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 36. Ordinances how to be made. Section 37. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 38. Annual report of Director. Section 39. Annual report of each Institute. Section 40. Council of Institutes. Section 41. Term of office and allowances payable to members of Council. Section 42. Function and duties of Council. Section 43. Power to make rules in respect of matters in this Chapter. Show Related Subordinates Section 44. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 45. Returns and information to be provided to Central Government. Section 46. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 47. Institute to be public authority under Right to Information Act. Section 48. Transitional provisions. Section 49. Power to remove difficulties. Section 50. Laying of rules and notification. Schedule 1.
